requirement_topic.en: EMC and TRA Type Approval for Power Banks with Wireless / Integrated Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 含无线/集成电子元件移动电源的EMC与TRA型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: 含無線/整合電子元件行動電源的EMC與TRA型號核准

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electronic apparatus in Oman and are assessed against the GSO EMC standards adopted by DGSM (GSO standards transposed from IEC/CISPR for emissions and immunity). If the power bank incorporates any wireless function (Qi wireless-charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), the device additionally requires type approval from the Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Oman (TRA), which authorises the radio interface, frequency bands, and equipment for use in Oman. There is no CE marking in Oman; conformity is demonstrated through DGSM/GSO conformity plus TRA type approval for radio. A mains-charged unit's adapter must also meet safety/EMC conformity for Oman's 240 V / 50 Hz supply.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）在阿曼属于电子装置，依据DGSM采纳的GSO EMC标准（自IEC/CISPR转化的辐射与抗扰度标准）进行评定。若移动电源含任何无线功能（Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），该设备还须取得阿曼电信监管局（TRA）型号核准，由其核准无线接口、频段及在阿曼使用的设备。阿曼不使用CE标志；合规通过DGSM/GSO合格评定加上无线的TRA型号核准来证明。经市电充电的适配器还须满足阿曼240 V / 50 Hz供电的安全/EMC合格评定。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）在阿曼屬於電子裝置，依據DGSM採納的GSO EMC標準（自IEC/CISPR轉化的輻射與抗擾度標準）進行評定。若行動電源含任何無線功能（Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），該設備還須取得阿曼電信監管局（TRA）型號核准，由其核准無線接口、頻段及在阿曼使用的設備。阿曼不使用CE標誌；合規通過DGSM/GSO合格評定加上無線的TRA型號核准來證明。經市電充電的適配器還須滿足阿曼240 V / 50 Hz供電的安全/EMC合格評定。

standards_or_laws: GSO EMC standards adopted by DGSM (transposed from IEC/CISPR 32 emissions and CISPR 35 / IEC 61000 immunity)
Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Oman (TRA) — type approval for radio equipment and wireless functions
DGSM product conformity framework (no CE marking; conformity demonstrated via GSO conformity certificate)

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements use GB/T 9254.1-2021 (radio disturbance, Class B) for emissions and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity) for information technology equipment. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval administered by MIIT, specific to Chinese frequency allocations. Chinese GB/T EMC reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised by DGSM or by Oman's TRA; SRRC authorises radio use in China only and does not transfer to TRA type approval.
summary.zh: 中国国内EMC要求对信息技术设备采用GB/T 9254.1-2021（无线电骚扰，B类）用于辐射，GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度）。含无线功能的产品须取得由工信部管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国频率分配。中国GB/T EMC报告及SRRC核准不被DGSM或阿曼TRA认可；SRRC仅核准在中国使用无线电，不可转为TRA型号核准。
summary.zht: 中國國內EMC要求對信息技術設備採用GB/T 9254.1-2021（無線電騷擾，B類）用於輻射，GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度）。含無線功能的產品須取得由工信部管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國頻率分配。中國GB/T EMC報告及SRRC核准不被DGSM或阿曼TRA認可；SRRC僅核准在中國使用無線電，不可轉為TRA型號核准。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics must meet GSO EMC conformity through DGSM, and any wireless variant additionally needs TRA type approval — there is no CE route and no Chinese certificate substitutes. Key gaps: (1) Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC reports are not standalone DGSM evidence; an IEC/CISPR-aligned (GSO-adopted) test report is the practical basis; (2) SRRC approval does not transfer — a separate TRA type-approval application (radio band, equipment listing, in-country importer) is required for Qi/Bluetooth/NFC functions; (3) the product must operate only in TRA-authorised frequency bands; (4) the mains adapter must be conformity-assessed for 240 V / 50 Hz. Many Chinese power banks designed for the domestic market may use frequency channels or wireless variants needing re-characterisation for TRA acceptance.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源须通过DGSM满足GSO EMC合格评定，任何无线型号还须取得TRA型号核准——不存在CE路径，且无中国证书可替代。主要差距：（1）中国GB/T 9254 EMC报告非DGSM独立证据，符合IEC/CISPR（GSO采纳）的测试报告是实际基础；（2）SRRC核准不可转移——Qi/蓝牙/NFC功能须另行提交TRA型号核准申请（无线频段、设备列名、在地进口商）；（3）产品只能在TRA核准频段工作；（4）市电适配器须按240 V / 50 Hz合格评定。许多面向中国市场设计的移动电源可能使用的频道或无线变体需重新表征方可获TRA接受。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源須通過DGSM滿足GSO EMC合格評定，任何無線型號還須取得TRA型號核准——不存在CE路徑，且無中國證書可替代。主要差距：（1）中國GB/T 9254 EMC報告非DGSM獨立證據，符合IEC/CISPR（GSO採納）的測試報告是實際基礎；（2）SRRC核准不可轉移——Qi/藍牙/NFC功能須另行提交TRA型號核准申請（無線頻段、設備列名、在地進口商）；（3）產品只能在TRA核准頻段工作；（4）市電適配器須按240 V / 50 Hz合格評定。許多面向中國市場設計的行動電源可能使用的頻道或無線變體需重新表徵方可獲TRA接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — GSO EMC conformity via DGSM applies to power banks with integrated electronics; TRA type approval is mandatory for any wireless function before the device may be used or placed on the Omani market; there is no CE marking in Oman
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus assessed against GSO EMC standards through DGSM, and wireless variants additionally require TRA type approval — Oman has no CE marking and no Chinese certificate (GB/T 9254 or SRRC) is accepted as a substitute. The practical evidence base is IEC/CISPR-aligned EMC testing plus a separate TRA radio type-approval lodged via an in-country importer, with operation limited to TRA-authorised bands and the adapter rated for 240 V / 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源属于电子装置，通过DGSM依据GSO EMC标准评定，无线型号还须取得TRA型号核准——阿曼无CE标志，且不接受中国证书（GB/T 9254或SRRC）替代。实际证据基础为符合IEC/CISPR的EMC测试，加上经在地进口商提交的独立TRA无线型号核准，运行限于TRA核准频段，适配器按240 V / 50 Hz额定。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源屬於電子裝置，通過DGSM依據GSO EMC標準評定，無線型號還須取得TRA型號核准——阿曼無CE標誌，且不接受中國證書（GB/T 9254或SRRC）替代。實際證據基礎為符合IEC/CISPR的EMC測試，加上經在地進口商提交的獨立TRA無線型號核准，運行限於TRA核准頻段，適配器按240 V / 50 Hz額定。

source.publisher: Telecommunications Regulatory Authority of Oman (TRA) — type approval of telecommunications and radio equipment
